title: Finalize event taxonomy and lifecycle invariants
summary: Define the full transaction event taxonomy and lifecycle invariants for 0.4.0, aligning with deterministic resume and transaction boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: Event taxonomy lists all required tx events with definitions and required fields.
Lifecycle invariants cover ordering constraints and terminal/non-terminal rules.
Invariants align with deterministic resume and file intent rules.
Artifacts are consistent with the 0.4.0 canonical schema.

steps.description: Enumerate full taxonomy (tx.begin, tx.step.enter, tx.file_intent.*, tx.verify.*, tx.commit.*, tx.end.*).
Define each event’s purpose, required fields, and expected ordering.
Specify lifecycle invariants, including single active tx, intent-before-mutation, and terminal event constraints.
Write event taxonomy and invariants docs.

notes: This ticket is schema-spec only; no runtime changes.
Keep taxonomy concise but complete to support deterministic resume.
